reason: Verify Player remains independent-first and roadmap/status wording is accurate.
Verify Settings/SourceLibrary/media components follow Vue, accessibility, media fallback, and liquid-glass UI contracts.
Verify Emby external responses are typed/validated without broad any and sensitive fields do not leak into config/UI.
Verify DataSource store/manager responsibilities, persistence, and derived state boundaries.
Verify required typecheck/lint/build/Tauri build expectations and forbidden patterns.
Verify new services/components are placed in the expected Player directories and do not violate libmpv safety contracts.
Verify Emby endpoint mapping, stream URL handling, auth, redaction, and implementation risks are addressed.
